name: Cirrus

skills.name: Through the Clouds
skills.description: lgnores terrain after reaching level 4 and gains Movement Speed when usingBasic Attacks. Enemies hit by his Basic Attacks or skills take damage whenthey move.

skills.name: Cloud Descending
skills.description: Charges up, gaining Movement Speed. Then dashes forward, damaging andstunning enemies. Can jump back if he hits a hero.

skills.name: Razor Wind
skills.description: Throws wind blades that slow and deal damage to enemies 2 times. Then

skills.name: Soaring Whirlwind
skills.description: Carries an enemy into the air. Then strikes the ground, dealing area damage

tips: Cirrus is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Dexterity → Axe of Torment → Shadow Ripper → Eternity Blade.
Run Red for stats that match Cirrus's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Cloud Descending → Razor Wind → Soaring Whirlwind → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Cirrus excels into Hou Yi, Xiao Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Di Renjie, Mulan without team peel.

Cirrus sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Cirrus good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Cirrus is Tier B Assassin with 52.2% win rate, 0.2% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Cirrus build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade, siege breaker. Run Red arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Cirrus?
faqs.answer: Pick Di Renjie, Mulan into Cirrus. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Cirrus completes core items. Cirrus struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Cirrus counter?
faqs.answer: Cirrus is strong into Hou Yi, Xiao Qiao according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Cirrus when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Cirrus good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Cirrus sits at Tier B globally (52.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Cirrus play?
faqs.answer: Cirrus is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Cirrus?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Red arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Cirrus or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Cirrus vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Cirrus has +2.5% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Cirrus when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Cirrus?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.
